title: Trident Reforged
description: Makes the trident look more legendary!
body:
### Freshly redesigned and more powerful looking tridents! 

![Image](https://i.gyazo.com/caeabf91f2a4ffd2f49800fab5b9b44c.pngv)

**The following mods are required for this pack to work**

[ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

[EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features/)

The contents of this mini pack are from a greater project I'm working on called [Rappenem's Reforge](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/rappenems-reforge) which aims to resprite the whole game in this style. So if you like the pixel art on display here consider checking it out and supporting me on [Patreon](https://www.patreon.com/c/Rappenem) for early access as well as bonus content!

[![FF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe2313e6ca2c3df47d179aa09bbc4c57799f6094.png)](https://www.patreon.com/Rappenem)
[![D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/95be1badf0f5131587308606c53801d55223882c.png)](https://discord.com/invite/2hvKFfPzQt)[![F](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77276c296d994e962ff04b57a57206c7abf516de.png)](https://www.instagram.com/rappenems_reforge/)[![H](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24c2ce58d5be6a91a8fb4e14aee09b885f105ad5.png)](https://x.com/Rapps_Reforge)
